title: PSYamlTUI Menu Schema
description: Schema for PSYamlTUI root menu files, submenu import files, and vars files

then.description: Root menu file -- must have a top-level menu: wrapper

title.description: Title displayed at the top of the root menu. Supports {{token}} substitution.

then.description: Submenu import file -- top-level items: key only, no menu: wrapper

else.description: Vars file -- top-level vars: map of token substitution values

vars.description: Key/value pairs available as {{token}} substitutions in menu files. Values must be strings, bools, or numbers.

label.description: Display text for the menu item. Supports {{token}} substitution. Required.

description.description: Subtitle shown under the item when selected. Supports {{token}} substitution.

details.description: Extended detail text shown when the item is selected. Only meaningful on SCRIPT and FUNCTION nodes.

exit.description: When true, marks this node as a clean quit/exit item.

confirm.description: When true, prompts Y/N before executing the call. Hooks run before the confirm prompt.

call.description: Script path (.ps1) or PowerShell function name to execute. Supports {{token}} substitution. Must not contain | ; & >

import.description: Relative path to an external .yaml submenu file. Must be relative -- no absolute paths. Supports {{token}} substitution.

children.description: Inline submenu items. Cannot be combined with import:

params.description: Key/value pairs splatted to the call. Values must be strings, bools, or numbers only.

before.description: Pre-execution hook(s) that must return $true to proceed. Can be a function name string, a single hook map, or a list of hook maps.

oneOf.description: Shorthand -- single hook with no params. Must be a plain PS function name.
Multiple hooks -- run in order, first failure stops the chain.

hook.description: PowerShell function name to call as a gate. Must not contain path separators or file extensions.

params.description: Key/value pairs passed to the hook function. Values must be strings, bools, or numbers.
